principle: The dashboard is the Claire operating environment and must render runtime truth, route decisions, validation, evidence, and memory eligibility without fake run data.

sections.label: External Data Sources
sections.purpose: Feeds Claire with market, company, technology, regulatory, competitor, and system signals.

sections.label: ACS2 Intelligence Loops
sections.purpose: Live sensing/enrichment loops that hand governed signals to the lifecycle.

sections.label: Signal Governance
sections.purpose: Stages 1-5 source validation and signal consolidation.

sections.label: Entity Intelligence
sections.purpose: Stages 6-7 entity extraction and relationship mapping.

sections.label: Trend Discovery
sections.purpose: Stages 8-10 trend, cluster, thesis, and route gate formation.

sections.label: Route Branches
sections.purpose: Portfolio, breakthrough, design/system, acquisition, or insufficient-data routing.

sections.label: Technology Intelligence
sections.purpose: Route-aware support for design/software/system construction paths.

sections.label: Output & Validation
sections.purpose: Final authority for route integrity, evidence, contracts, confidence, and terminal state.

sections.label: Memory & Recursion
sections.purpose: Verified output memory and recursive learning eligibility only after validation.

sections.label: Runtime Infrastructure
sections.purpose: Runtime files, launch continuity, rollback safety, and route-proof contracts.

sections.label: Lifecycle Contracts
sections.purpose: Per-stage input, output, evidence, status, and completion requirements.

sections.label: Forward Roadmap
sections.purpose: Dashboard/system update packs close named architecture-map gaps.
